prompt:
An open logbook page with a simple hand-drawn ribbon of aurora colors across the top margin (greens and purples implied), and a few lines of compact handwritten notes beneath it, intentionally illegible. A red-lens flashlight and insulated gloves rest near the book, suggesting cold-weather skywatching.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 in a clean near-future field-kit style: soft cinematic lighting, no logos, no readable text, no harsh overlays. Keep the log entry page centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as an “aurora log.”
